films.title: Episode 1 — The Shop Without a Name
films.desc: Rita turns left when she meant to turn right. The alley narrows. The door has no sign. Inside, the shopkeeper is already waiting.

films.title: Episode 2 — The Whip Chooses
films.desc: She sees it behind the glass — black leather, braided tight. The handle is bone. She shouldn't touch it. But some things choose you.

films.title: Episode 3 — Berlin, 3 AM
films.desc: The city sleeps. Rita doesn't. The whip hums in her bag. She walks toward Oranienstraße without knowing why.

tracks.title: Track 01 — The Nameless Shop
tracks.desc: Ambient dark atmosphere. The sound of a door opening into a space that shouldn't exist.

tracks.title: Track 02 — Rita's Theme
tracks.desc: A pulse. A heartbeat. Something between longing and fear.

tracks.title: Track 03 — The First Touch
tracks.desc: The moment skin meets leather. Everything changes.

clips.title: Music Video 01
clips.desc: Visual story for Track 01. Dark, atmospheric, AI-animated.

clips.title: Music Video 02
clips.desc: Visual story for Track 02. A face in the window. A door that shouldn't be there.

audiobooks.title: Audiobook — Skin Me
audiobooks.desc: The complete novel, read aloud. Every whisper, every silence — preserved. Generated with ElevenLabs. Included in the Premium bundle ($49).

album.title: Full Soundtrack — 20 Tracks
album.desc: 20 original tracks composed for the Namenlos universe. Each song belongs to a scene, a character, a turning point.
